databrew.job.jobsample.Mode.Description: A value that determines whether the profile job is run on the entire dataset or a specified number of rows. This value must be one of the following:  + FULL_DATASET - The profile job is run on the entire dataset.+ CUSTOM_ROWS - The profile job is run on the number of rows specified in the `Size` parameter.

databrew.job.jobsample.Size.Description: The `Size` parameter is only required when the mode is CUSTOM_ROWS. The profile job is run on the specified number of rows. The maximum value for size is Long.MAX_VALUE.  Long.MAX_VALUE = 9223372036854775807
